title: Base metals gain as China promises further economic support measures
section_path: Base metals gain as China promises further economic support measures
section_path_text: Base metals gain as China promises further economic support measures
summary:
Main
A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities erase earlier losses to end the week higher. This was supported by rising expectations of stimulus measures in China which saw industrial commodities rebound strongly. Image reference: 1653860619388.png | assets/2022-05-30_base-metals-gain-as-china-promises-further-economic-support-measures_img_1653860619388_8244c458325e.png
Base metals ended the week strongly as the combination of easing restrictions and further stimulus measures in China boosted sentiment.
